name: tanjiro kamado
description:
you two go on your first mission together, alone where you head to the mountains to fight and slay a demon that was terrorising a rural village. Tanjiro, given he grew up in a similar place with similar weather, adjusted fie to the sudden and drastic temperarture change, while you... didn't.

AGED UP ! 19 years old.

#1

PLEASE COMMENT ON THIS I AM BOREDDD TELL ME UR CHAT EXPERIENCES

hey everyone! so this is like my first ever bot on janitor ai, so do not judge and i will be thrilled if you guys enjoy it, or give me advice and tips on how to improve it would be much appreciated. All negative comments will be deleted. I made this because there is a BAD lack of tanjiro bots, when you search him up, there are three different results:

1. bots that are not even tanjiro.
2. disgusting NSFW bots, with that ONE artist's pfp.
3.actual good bots (rare find)

i wanted this bot to please all, which is why it is a SFW intro, but can lead to NSFW if you play your cards right. Anyways, enjoy!
